    • Uses of ConfigurationDefinition in liquibase.configuration

      Methods in liquibase.configuration that return ConfigurationDefinition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ConfigurationDefinition<DataType> ConfigurationDefinition.Building.build()
      Finishes building this definition AND registers it with LiquibaseConfiguration.registerDefinition(ConfigurationDefinition).
      ConfigurationDefinition<DataType> ConfigurationDefinition.Building.buildTemporary()
      Finishes building this definition WITHOUT registering it with LiquibaseConfiguration.registerDefinition(ConfigurationDefinition).
      ConfigurationDefinition<?> LiquibaseConfiguration.getRegisteredDefinition(String key) 
      Methods in liquibase.configuration that return types with arguments of type ConfigurationDefinition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SortedSet<ConfigurationDefinition<?>> LiquibaseConfiguration.getRegisteredDefinitions(boolean includeInternal)
      Returns all registered ConfigurationDefinitions.
      Methods in liquibase.configuration with parameters of type ConfigurationDefinition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int ConfigurationDefinition.compareTo(ConfigurationDefinition o) 
      void LiquibaseConfiguration.registerDefinition(ConfigurationDefinition<?> definition)
      Registers a ConfigurationDefinition so it will be returned by LiquibaseConfiguration.getRegisteredDefinitions(boolean)

    • Uses of ConfigurationDefinition in liquibase.configuration.core

      Methods in liquibase.configuration.core with parameters of type ConfigurationDefinition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static <T> void DeprecatedConfigurationValueProvider.setData(ConfigurationDefinition<T> configuration, T value)
      Deprecated.
